description: How time works in this world — its structure and calendar.

type.description: LINEAR — time points have a natural order and sort lexicographically. ABSTRACT — time points are unordered labels; sequence is defined through the graph.

epoch.name: The Founding
epoch.description: Year zero begins with the founding of the First Kingdom

examples.name: Dreamworld
examples.description: Time has no direction here; connections define sequence

perception.description: Each dreamer experiences a different duration for the same event

anchors.description: Recurring events that dreamers use to orient themselves in time
